name: BANK OF HAWAII CORP
business: Bank of Hawaii Corporation provides a broad range of financial products and services primarily to customers in Hawai'i, Guam, and other Pacific Islands. It is organized into three business segments: Consumer Banking, Commercial Banking, and Treasury and Other. The company's principal operating subsidiary is Bank of Hawaii, a state-chartered bank.
sellsTo: Hawai'i, Guam, and other Pacific Islands

exposures.sentence: A failure in or breach of our operational systems, information systems, or infrastructure, or those of our third-party vendors and other service providers, may result in financial losses, loss of customers, or damage to our reputation.
Our loan portfolio is largely secured by real estate, and a downturn in the real estate market may adversely affect our results of operations.
Any reduction in defense spending by the federal government in the State of Hawai i could adversely impact the economy in Hawai i and the West Pacific.
